options.name: --help
options.description: Show this message and exit

options.name: --version
options.description: Show the version of this command

options.name: -o
options.description:
The SPIR-V <output_file>, expecting a single input
file.

options.name: --batch
options.description:
A batch <file> containing a JSON representation of
the items to compile.

options.name: --generate-deps
options.description: Generates deps file used by build system.

options.name: --max-thread-count
options.description:
The maximum <number> of threads to use to compile
all the inputs. Default is 0 (Maximum number of
cores available)

options.name: --invert-y
options.description: Invert the Y axis of the coordinate system.

options.name: --shader-stage
options.description:
more inputs from the command line. Possible
values are: anyhit, callable, closesthit,
compute, fragment, geometry, intersection, miss,
raygen, tesscontrol, tesseval, vertex.

options.name: --target-env
options.description:
The target environment <value> for the shader.
Possible values are: opengl, opengl4.5, vulkan,
vulkan1.0, vulkan1.1, vulkan1.2, vulkan1.3.

options.name: --target-spv
options.description:
generated module. Possible values are: spv1.0,
spv1.1, spv1.2, spv1.3, spv1.4, spv1.5, spv1.6.

options.name: -x
options.description:
specify the <lang> of the input shader files.
Possible values are: glsl, hlsl.

options.name: -c
options.description: Run the preprocessing and compiling stage.

options.name: -E
options.description: Run the preprocessing stage.

options.name: -S
options.description:
Run the preprocessing, compiling, and then
disassembling stage.

options.name: --define
options.description: Add a macro name and an optional value

options.name: --include-dir
options.description:
Adds the specified <directory> to the search path
for include files.

options.name: -g
options.description: Generate debug information.

options.name: -O0
options.description:
No optimization. This level generates the most
debuggable code. -Os Enables optimizations to
reduce code size. -O The default optimization
level for better performance.

options.name: --hlsl-16bit-types
options.description: Enables 16bit types for HLSL compilation.

options.name: --hlsl-offsets
options.description:
Use HLSL packing rules instead of GLSL rules when
determining offsets of members of blocks. This
option is always on when compiling for HLSL.

options.name: --hlsl-functionality1
options.description: Enable extension SPV_GOOGLE_hlsl_functionality1.

options.name: --entry-point
options.description: The entry point function <name>.

options.name: --auto-map-locations
options.description:
Automatically assign locations to all shader
inputs and outputs. For HLSL compilation, this
option is on by default.

options.name: --auto-bind-uniforms
options.description:
Directs the compiler to automatically assign
binding numbers to uniform variables, when an
explicit binding is not specified in the shader
source.
@file                      Read response file for more options.
